name: Bug Report

about: Report deterministic governance or verification issues

title: ""

labels: bug

\---



\# Summary



Describe the issue clearly.



\---



\# Expected Behavior



Describe the expected deterministic behavior.



\---



\# Actual Behavior



Describe the observed behavior.



\---



\# Reproduction Steps



Provide deterministic reproduction steps.



\---



\# Governance Impact



Indicate whether the issue affects:



\- deterministic execution

\- replay protection

\- fail-closed behavior

\- provenance integrity

\- portable verification

\- runtime compatibility

\- trust continuity



\---



\# Environment



\- OS:

\- Node Version:

\- Package Version:



\---



\# Additional Context



Provide any additional governance or operational context.

\# Feature Request Template

notepad .\\.github\\ISSUE\_TEMPLATE\\feature\_request.md

\---

name: Feature Request

about: Propose deterministic governance improvements

title: ""

labels: enhancement

\---



\# Summary



Describe the proposed capability.



\---



\# Governance Motivation



Explain why this improves deterministic governance infrastructure.



\---



\# Compatibility Considerations



Describe any impact on:



\- deterministic semantics

\- replay safety

\- fail-closed behavior

\- provenance guarantees

\- portable verification

\- trust continuity



\---



\# Proposed Design



Describe the proposed implementation direction.



\---



\# Alternatives Considered



Describe any alternative approaches considered.
